title: Agent Behavior Analytics/Exabeam Nova
description: Agent Behavior Analytics detects anomalous AI agent behavior using patented behavioral analytics. Exabeam Nova prioritizes risk with dynamic scoring and reduces TDIR workload by up to 80% through automated investigation, timeline reconstruction, contextual summaries, and analyst assistant guidance aligned to investigation outcomes.

items: Conducting Agentic Threat Modeling, Identify system-wide non-human Identities & Auth Protocols, Draft policy for Agent privilege boundaries
Correlate telemetry from agent step tracing, tool execution, & message logs.
Alert on anomalies;  e.g., goal reversal, unexpected plan depth, adversarial-input, excessive tool usage, or rapid inter-agent chatter.
Align control evidence with frameworks like EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF, & ISO/IEC 42001.
Automate goal alignment audits, including adversarial review of long-term agent memory.
